title: Hexxy Skies
body:
A [**Hexcasting**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) x [**Valkyrien Skies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) Interop Addon. With this addon, Hexcasters will be able to get information from and manipulate Ships. To this end, there are also other interop functions with other Hexcasting addons as listed below.

For a full list of patterns and spells, look at the Wiki!

**This mod was originally made by walksanator who has passed the project to me.**

### Extra Interop:
- [**ComplexHex**](https://modrinth.com/mod/complex-hex)
  - Provided Longs and Quaternions used to get more Ship information
- [**Hexal**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexal/)
  - Wisps can choose to enter/exit the Shipyard
- [**Hexical**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexical)
  - The **Assemble** spell can take in a Mesh Entity
- [**Hexodus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexodus)
  - All patterns and spells can accept a Ship instead of an Entity
- [**MoreIotas**](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreiotas/)
  - Provided Strings and Matrices used to get more Ship information
